title: Minecraft Legends Rabbits (Optifine)
description: Changes the rabbit model and texture to look like the rabbits from Minecraft Legends.
body: There was only one [pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-legends-rabbit) (that I could find) like this, so I made one myself. This pack includes all of the rabbit variants, I just haven't uploaded all of the photos. Needs [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to work (or some sort of cem file loader) Let me know if there's any problem or if one of the textures should be tweaked Dedicated to Xenoraptor
